headline: Strategic angle — ESG narrative differentiation via proactive compliance and transparent remediation
what_matters: Negative gap in governance scores versus peers; risk of index exclusion if unresolved.
BRSR [MANDATORY], GRI, COSO ERM, ESRS triggered; risk of SEBI scrutiny, trading restrictions, and penalties.
Trust deficit may impact talent attraction and customer retention, especially in international markets.
action: Immediate board-level review and enhanced disclosure are required to mitigate regulatory and reputational fallout.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive compliance and transparent remediation
